question: Was the average unemployment rate in India higher than in the United States over the 10-year period?

options.A: Yes, India had a higher average unemployment rate
options.B: No, the United States had a higher average unemployment rate
options.C: They had equal average unemployment rates

explanation: India or United States appears grey on the map, which represents missing data, not a true value. Since one of the regions has no data, we cannot reliably compare their values, even though the color scale may tempt viewers to do so.
